utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan, present items are: health_coverage (included), adventure_sports_coverage (not part of required format), total_budget (included), additional_services (included). Missing property_coverage and travel_coverage entirely. Now check completeness: health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs; plan includes provider, monthly_premium, and separate amounts labeled physical_health_coverage and mental_health_coverage (appear to be costs, though ambiguous, but counts). So health_coverage is sufficiently specified. property_coverage: absent. travel_coverage: absent. additional_services: includes services but not explicit costs; required says any enhancement services with costs. No costs provided, so not fully specified. total_budget: includes monthly and annual cost breakdown; provided. Therefore fully specified items: health_coverage and total_budget. additional_services lacks costs, so not fully specified. Total covered: 2 out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes one identifiable provider from the ground-truth list: PrimeCare Premium Plan for both physical and mental health coverage. The adventure sports coverage and additional services are custom descriptors, not matching any specific rated items in the ground truth. Therefore, only PrimeCare Premium Plan needs to be mapped for both its physical and mental health components to their respective ratings.
